description_long: This is a red Coca-Cola can with a classic cylindrical shape and slightly indented top and bottom rims. The can features the iconic white Coca-Cola script logo prominently displayed on a vibrant red background, accented by dynamic white and yellow swooshes and water droplet graphics to evoke a sense of refreshment. The top of the can is metallic gray, with a standard pull-tab opening mechanism, while the bottom is also metallic and slightly concave. Nutritional information, ingredients, and barcode are printed on the back in white text, along with the volume marking of 33 cl. The surface of the can is glossy and smooth, reflecting light and giving it a sleek appearance. The overall design is instantly recognizable and intended to attract attention in urban environments such as vending machines, convenience stores, or public spaces.
description: A glossy red Coca-Cola can with white script logo, yellow accents, and water droplet graphics, featuring a metallic top and detailed labeling on the back.
description_view_0: The can displays the large white Coca-Cola script logo with yellow and white swooshes and water droplets on a red background.
description_view_1: This view centers the Coca-Cola logo, showing the full branding and dynamic swoosh design most prominently.
description_view_2: The back of the can is visible, showing nutritional information, ingredients, barcode, and the word 'Coke' in small print.
description_view_3: This angle highlights the transition between the logo and the detailed product information, with both branding and labeling partially visible.
attribute_brand_logo: The Coca-Cola logo is prominently displayed in white script on the front and side of the can, occupying a large portion of the red surface with yellow and white swoosh accents.
attribute_flavor_indication: The can uses the classic Coca-Cola red color and script, which is universally associated with the original cola flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information, ingredients, and a barcode are visible on the back of the can in white text.
